recommendedCommitBatches.title: EBOS validated system updates
recommendedCommitBatches.description: EBOS lib/modules/tests, EBOS scripts, EBOS docs, validation page assets/routes, and project EBOS operating rules. Excludes package, Prisma, admin, and non-EBOS core app files.
recommendedCommitBatches.stagedCommandProposal: git add -- AGENTS.md src/lib/ebos scripts/*ebos*.ts docs/ebos src/components/validation-ai-prompt-kit-page.tsx src/app/(zh-public)/validation src/app/en/validation

recommendedCommitBatches.title: Deployment guard updates
recommendedCommitBatches.description: Only app-entrypoint, docker-compose, and deploy README should be committed here after review. Current other deploy changes remain separate-audit candidates.

recommendedCommitBatches.title: Generated EBOS reports only
recommendedCommitBatches.description: Generated reports and evidence under reports/ebos. This can be committed separately if the report volume is too large for Batch 1.

recommendedCommitBatches.title: Excluded / separate audit
recommendedCommitBatches.description: Do not include in an EBOS safety commit without a dedicated audit: package files, Prisma schema/migrations/seeds, admin/core app files, non-EBOS scripts, content/design/log/tmp files, and unknown files.

safeGitAddProposal.command:
git add --
  AGENTS.md
  src/lib/ebos
  scripts/*ebos*.ts
  docs/ebos
  reports/ebos
  src/components/validation-ai-prompt-kit-page.tsx
  src/app/(zh-public)/validation
  src/app/en/validation

requiredBeforeCommit: Use precise git add paths only.
Verify git diff --cached --name-only excludes package.json, package-lock.json, prisma/**, src/app/admin/**, .env, .next/**, and node_modules/**.
Run EBOS tests, lint, typecheck, and build after staging if a commit is created.

warnings: This audit is read-only and did not stage, commit, push, migrate, deploy, or run server/Docker/Nginx commands.
The main worktree contains broad non-EBOS dirty state; use precise git add paths only.
package.json or package-lock.json is dirty and must be audited separately.
Prisma files are dirty or untracked and must not be committed with EBOS reports.
src/app/admin changes are present and must not be committed with EBOS reports.
Deployment config changes exist; only migration guard files should be committed after review.
blockers: package dirty state blocks any broad commit.
Prisma dirty state blocks any broad commit.
Admin dirty state blocks any broad commit.
Unclassified or non-EBOS files require separate audit before commit.
nextActions: Keep this step as report-only unless the user explicitly approves staging.
If committing, start with Batch 1 EBOS validated system updates or Batch 3 generated reports only.
Audit package, Prisma, admin/core app, content/design/log/tmp changes separately before any broader commit.
Continue real external publishing only after a clean EBOS commit plan exists.
